list.label: GSAP Scroll Animations
list.title: Mastering Scroll Animations with GSAP ScrollTrigger
list.excerpt: A deep dive into creating buttery-smooth scroll-driven animations with GSAP's ScrollTrigger plugin — from basic reveals to complex parallax effects.

list.label: Performant Dashboards
list.title: Building Performant Real-Time Dashboards
list.excerpt: Strategies for building dashboards that handle thousands of data points without dropping frames — virtualization, WebSockets, and smart re-rendering.

list.label: C++ for Web Devs
list.title: Modern C++ Patterns for Web Developers
list.excerpt: How concepts from modern C++ like RAII, move semantics, and compile-time computation can improve how you think about JavaScript and TypeScript.

list.label: Scalable Design Systems
list.title: Design Systems That Scale: From Tokens to Components
list.excerpt: Building a design system from scratch — design tokens, component APIs, documentation, and the tooling that ties it all together.

list.label: Edge Computing
list.title: Edge Computing with Cloudflare Workers and Durable Objects
list.excerpt: Deploying stateful applications at the edge — real-time collaboration, rate limiting, and session management without a traditional backend.

list.label: Wasm in Production
list.title: WebAssembly in Production: Lessons Learned
list.excerpt: Practical experiences integrating Wasm modules into production web apps — image processing, crypto, and computational geometry at near-native speed.

list.label: Art of Code Review
list.title: The Art of Code Review: Beyond Syntax Checking
list.excerpt: How to give reviews that improve architecture, mentorship, and team velocity — not just catch bugs.

about.name: Calil Drissi
bio: I'm a software developer based in Morocco with 4+ years of experience building web products for startups, agencies, and brands worldwide. I specialize in crafting performant, visually refined digital experiences.

My work spans the full stack — from pixel-perfect frontends with React and Next.js to robust backend systems with Node.js and Python. I'm passionate about animation, interaction design, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible on the web.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new tools, contributing to open source, or mentoring aspiring developers in the Moroccan tech community.

chat.greeting: Hey! 👋 I'm Calil's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his work, experience, tech stack, or availability. I'm here to help!

responses.stack: Calil works primarily with React, Next.js, and TypeScript on the frontend, paired with Node.js, Python, and PostgreSQL on the backend. He's also experienced with Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Three.js, and various cloud platforms.
responses.experience: Calil has 4+ years of professional experience, delivering 15+ projects for startups, agencies, and brands. He's worked across fintech, e-commerce, health tech, and SaaS industries.
responses.available: Yes! Calil is currently available for new projects. He works remotely from Morocco (GMT+1) and collaborates with clients globally. You can schedule a discovery call or request a cost estimate.
responses.pricing: Calil's rates depend on the project scope and complexity. For an accurate estimate, it's best to schedule a discovery call or send a project brief to hello@calildrissi.dev.
responses.contact: You can reach Calil via email at hello@calildrissi.dev, or connect on LinkedIn, GitHub, or Twitter. He typically responds within 24 hours.
responses.default: Great question! For detailed inquiries, the best way to get a thorough answer is to reach out directly at hello@calildrissi.dev or schedule a call. Calil is always happy to chat about potential projects.
